rental.title: Storage Container Rental
rental.subtitle: Secure storage in 20' or 40' containers at Ptuj and Maribor locations
rental.description: Our storage containers are an ideal solution for businesses and individuals looking for safe, accessible and flexible storage. Containers are placed at well-maintained, secured locations in Ptuj and Maribor, accessible anytime - even on weekends and holidays. The minimum rental period is one month, and the contract can be extended without complications.
